vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-functional. There is no evidence of photosynthesis or plant viability in any of the registered pots. The 'plants' are effectively absent.

Total absence of expected botanical specimens across all pots.
vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a chronological audit of the provided image stack. My first action was to establish the spatial orientation of the pots and the scale anchor. Upon validation, it is clear that the registry does not match the physical reality of the desk. The pots are devoid of the specified plants, suggesting either a total systemic loss or that the plants were never established. The only notable event was the temporary placement of a metal spoon, which has since been removed. The biome is currently in a state of total dormancy or failure.
